source.title: Safety-Aware Optimal Control With Language-Guided Online Parameter Adjustment via Large Language Models

language.feedback_query: Watch out! I think it's going to crash soon.

reconstruction_assumptions.controller.initial_gamma: The current fixed baseline uses the experimental upper bound; the paper does not publish the raw initial OF response for the ablation query.
reconstruction_assumptions.controller.reference_mode: Direct targeting reconstructs the paper task; the exact reference generator is unpublished.
reconstruction_assumptions.controller.cbf_transition_mode: Uses the published state transition in Equations (17)-(18).
reconstruction_assumptions.benchmark.seed: The paper does not publish random seeds.
reconstruction_assumptions.benchmark.max_steps: Physics-derived 220-step completion budget; the paper does not publish an episode timeout.
reconstruction_assumptions.benchmark.fixed_lateral_offset_m: Head-on reconstruction; the paper does not publish the obstacle's lateral offset.
reconstruction_assumptions.benchmark.intervention_time_lower_s: Frozen reconstruction interval; the paper states random timing but not its distribution.
reconstruction_assumptions.benchmark.intervention_time_upper_s: Frozen reconstruction interval; the paper states random timing but not its distribution.
reconstruction_assumptions.benchmark.feedback_schedule_mode: Elapsed-time scheduling implements the paper's random on-demand intervention; the exact author mechanism is unpublished.
reconstruction_assumptions.language.feedback_request_policy: The ablation describes 50 independent episodes, gives one singular feedback utterance for the feedback-enabled variant, and averages OpenAI round-trip latency over 50 episodes. We therefore infer one feedback request per feedback-enabled episode; Algorithm 1 does not impose a universal one-intervention limit.
reconstruction_assumptions.benchmark.latency_trace_mode: The ablation evidence supports a separate request record per feedback episode, but does not disclose threading. This implementation pre-collects one uncached request per condition and replays its latency rather than launching it at the intervention wall-clock time.
reconstruction_assumptions.benchmark.gamma_update_ttl_seconds: Set to the 220-step episode duration so an arrived paper-style response is not rejected by an unpublished one-second TTL.
reconstruction_assumptions.benchmark.reference_speed_mps: Reconstruction value; the paper does not publish gripper reference speed.
reconstruction_assumptions.scene: All numeric scene geometry and relative poses are reconstruction values because the paper does not publish them.
reconstruction_assumptions.solver_policy: Fail-closed implementation policy; the paper names IPOPT but does not publish acceptance tolerances or deadline handling.
reconstruction_assumptions.language.prompt_source: The paper reports GPT-4o and the two ablation utterances but does not publish TP/OF system prompts or the exact model snapshot.
